breakdown: Naming: Clean mechanical datetime modernization - using `UTC` consistently. No generic names introduced. Error Handling: No error handling changes; existing patterns unchanged. Type Safety: Good - modernization from `timezone.utc` to `datetime.UTC` is the correct typed approach. No `any` types introduced. Architecture: Single file mechanical changes; no module boundary changes or circular import risks. Test Coverage: Changes are refactoring-only (datetime modernization); no new tests added. The design doc mentions verification coverage gaps. Documentation: Code has no docstrings added. The large design doc section is review documentation not actual code documentation (docstrings/comments explaining WHY).
key_changes: Remove unused `timezone` import from datetime module
Add design document review section with 12 work items for level-up centralization
